# Trading Tazos Game — Full Documentation for AI Crawlers

> Last updated: 2026-06-09

## What is Trading Tazos Game?

Trading Tazos Game (TTG) is a browser-based digital collectible and battle game. Players open virtual bags to discover tazos (pogs/caps), build decks, and compete in a 3D physics-based vertical slam battle arena. The game draws inspiration from 90s snack toy collections popular in Spain and Latin America.

## Gameplay

### Collections
- **3 franchises**: Minimon (61 tazos, Matutano 2000), Dracobell (128 tazos, Matutano 1995), Cybermon (160 tazos, Magic Box 2000)
- **349 total tazos** planned, 32 currently published
- Each tazo has a creature image, combat stats, rarity, and physical finish effect

### Battle System (Vertical Slam)
1. **Aim** — Lock crosshair on target zone
2. **Charge** — Time power bar for slam force
3. **Tilt** — Angle throw for landing precision
4. **Slam** — Tazo drops from above, flips face-down opponent tazos
5. **Score** — Flip your own: +1pt, flip opponent's: +2pts, double flip bonus: +1pt. First to 5 wins.

### Combat Stats (9 per tazo)
Attack, Defense, Resistance, Weight, Stability, Spin, Control, Bounce, Precision

### Tazo Finishes (18 types)
normal, matte, glossy, holo, reverse_holo, foil, prismatic, metallic, chrome, gold, rainbow, glitter, stardust, aurora, cracked_ice, oil_slick, lenticular, pearlescent

### Creature Variants
standard, shiny, shadow, golden

### Rarities
common, uncommon, rare, ultra, legendary, epic

## Technical Architecture

- **Frontend**: Next.js 16 App Router, React 19, Tailwind CSS 4, Three.js / React Three Fiber, Zustand
- **Backend**: Next.js API routes, Prisma ORM, SQLite database, JWT auth, bcrypt
- **Deployment**: VPS (Linux), PM2 process manager (cluster mode), Caddy reverse proxy
- **WebSocket**: ws-server.js (PM2-managed) for real-time matchmaking
- **PWA**: Full Progressive Web App support with install prompts, offline capability, push notifications
- **Domain**: tradingtazosgame.com (HTTPS via Let's Encrypt)

## Page Structure

### Public (SEO)
| Route | Description |
|-------|------------|
| `/` | Magazine-style landing with hero, tazo showcase, how-to-play, collections, leaderboard, FAQ |
| `/how-to-play` | Vertical Slam battle tutorial |
| `/tazos` | Filterable public tazo catalog |
| `/collections/minimon` | Minimon franchise landing page |
| `/collections/dracobell` | Dracobell franchise landing page |
| `/collections/cybermon` | Cybermon franchise landing page |
| `/leaderboard` | Public top player rankings |
| `/download` | Desktop app downloads |
| `/shop` | Public bag shop preview |
| `/login` / `/register` | Auth pages |
| `/privacy` `/terms` `/cookies` `/disclaimer` `/contact` | Legal pages |

### Authenticated (App)
| Route | Description |
|-------|------------|
| `/app` | Game hub / launcher (redirects to collection) |
| `/app/collection` | 2D album viewer with drag-and-drop, stack, zoom |
| `/app/decks` | Deck builder — create and manage 5-tazo battle decks |
| `/app/battle` | 3D vertical slam arena (vs AI or PvP) |
| `/app/shop` | Bag shop with reveal animations |
| `/app/leaderboard` | Detailed rankings with filters |
| `/app/marketplace` | Player-to-player trading |
| `/app/settings` | Account settings |

### Admin (Developer Only)
| Route | Description |
|-------|------------|
| `/admin` | Protected admin panel |
| `/admin/tazos` | Tazo CRUD, batch operations, publish control |
| `/admin/tazo-creator` | Form-based tazo creation wizard |
| `/admin/tazo-designer` | Visual drag-and-drop tazo layout editor with finish shader preview |

## API Routes (Public)
- `GET /api/tazos` — Paginated tazo catalog (query: ?publishStatus, ?franchise, ?rarity, ?finish, ?search)
- `GET /api/tazos/[slug]` — Single tazo detail
- `GET /api/leaderboard` — Top players by wins, collection size, score
- `GET /api/quests` — Available quest definitions
- `GET /api/decks` — Public deck showcase
- `POST /api/auth/login` — Email + password authentication
- `POST /api/auth/register` — Account creation (grants 10 free bags)
- `GET /api/auth/oauth/*` — OAuth flow (GitHub, Google, Discord)

- Support email: support@tradingtazosgame.com

## SEO Assets
- robots.txt: allows all crawlers, disallows /api/, /_next/, /admin
- sitemap.xml: 20 URLs with priorities and change frequencies
- llms.txt / llms-full.txt: AI crawler discoverability
- JSON-LD structured data: VideoGame schema
- Open Graph + Twitter Card tags
- PWA manifest with app shortcuts and screenshots
- geo.region / geo.placename meta tags
